title: Shearing Sheeps Drop op loot
description: Shear a sheep → get insane end-game loot. Works on every version from 1.21 to 1.21.10. Adds custom loot table, and turns sheep into walking OP supply crates. Perfect for chaos survival or challenge world
body:
🐑 SHEAR A SHEEP → GET OP LOOT

This datapack turns every sheep into a loot box.
Shear one, and BOOM — it drops end-game items, enchanted gear, blocks, resources, rare items, and more.

No wool. No limits. Pure chaos.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21 → 1.21.10 


✨ FEATURES

✔ Shearing drops OP loot (huge custom loot table)

✔ Works on ALL versions 1.21 → 1.21.10

✔ Safe for singleplayer & servers

✔ Lightweight — no lag, no commands needed after install


🎁 INCLUDED LOOT

You can get things like:

Blocks: Netherite, Diamonds, Beacons, Ender Chests, Obsidian

Gear: Enchanted Netherite Tools, Elytra, Trident, Bow, Crossbow

Items: Rockets, Totems, Pearls, Blaze Rods, Nautilus Shells

Food: Golden Apples, Suspicious Stew, Cooked meats

MUCH more (40+ OP items)
